title: Smoky Crisp Spanish Oranges Empanadas
description: A kid-friendly Spanish-inspired dish featuring smoky-savory empanadas filled with crisp oranges and sous-vide cooked for tender texture, low-sodium friendly.

ingredients.name: sous-vide orange slices
ingredients.notes: thin slices from 2 medium oranges, lightly salted for smokiness

ingredients.name: smoke-infused oil
ingredients.notes: made from 1 tsp smoked paprika + 1 tsp olive oil, no added salt

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: low-sodium option: use potassium chloride or skip entirely

instructions: Slice 2 medium oranges into thin rounds; salt lightly to enhance smokiness.
Prepare smoke-infused oil: blend 1 tsp smoked paprika with 1 tbsp olive oil, no salt.
Mix flour and water to form dough; knead for 2 minutes until smooth.
Add salt and smoke-infused oil to dough; divide into 12 equal portions for empanadas.
Shape each portion into small patties; place orange slices inside.
Sous-vide at 140°F (60°C) for 10 minutes to ensure crispness without overcooking.
Drain excess liquid and serve warm with a side of lime wedges for brightness.
